allow:
Bash(docker run --rm udap-pki-cli -c "
echo ''=== /root/.bashrc ===''
cat /root/.bashrc
echo ''''
echo ''=== /root/.profile ===''
cat /root/.profile
echo ''''
echo ''=== /etc/inputrc ===''
cat /etc/inputrc
echo ''''
echo ''=== /etc/profile.d/ ===''
ls -la /etc/profile.d/
echo ''''
echo ''=== /etc/bash_completion.d/ ===''
ls -la /etc/bash_completion.d/ 2>/dev/null
echo ''''
echo ''=== gcloud shell files ===''
find /opt/google-cloud-sdk -name ''*.bashrc'' -o -name ''*.bash*'' -o -name ''*.sh'' -o -name ''properties'' 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo ''''
echo ''=== check if install.sh modified anything ===''
find /opt/google-cloud-sdk -name ''install.sh'' -exec head -50 {} \\;
")
Bash(docker run --rm udap-pki-cli -c "rm /etc/inputrc && exec bash -c ''cd /app && compgen -f Udap''")

Bash(docker run --rm mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/runtime:8.0 bash -c "ldd /bin/bash | grep -i read; ls -la /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libreadline* 2>/dev/null; ls -la /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libreadline* 2>/dev/null; dpkg -l | grep readline 2>/dev/null")
